title: DeepSeek V4 Analysis..
summary: Caleb Writes Code analyzes DeepSeek V4, highlighting its major advance in reducing inference compute and cost while maintaining capability. The video discusses how V4 represents a shift in the AI race dynamic between open and closed labs, driven by different national incentives for AI development.
